arts.ttl: Lazio Pondering Formation Change Against Inter To Make Room for In-Form Midfielder
arts.sum: Lazio coach Marco Baroni could make a tactical switch for the clash against Inter to fit in Fisayo Dele-Bashiru who has been delivering the goods as of late. A Star on the Rise The Nigerian midfielder had a relatively slow start to life at Formello after making the summer switch from Hatayspor. arts.ttl: Inter eye German talent Rocco Reitz: The Bundesliga’s rising star
